article.title: Как установить Serpmonn: на экран телефона и APK для Android

summary.title: Коротко:
summary.text: есть два способа. «На главный экран» — без магазина приложений, через браузер. APK — файл для Android, если нужен отдельный ярлык как у обычного приложения.

sections.title: Что выбрать
items: Установить на главный экран — сайт откроется как приложение: свой значок, полноэкранный режим. Подходит большинству. Не нужно ничего скачивать из магазинов.
Serpmonn для Android (.apk) — установочный файл. Удобно, если браузер плохо предлагает установку или нужен отдельный Android-ярлык.
Serpmonn Messenger — отдельное Android-приложение (пре-альфа). Веб-версии чата пока нет: пункт в меню ведёт на страницу со скачиванием APK мессенджера.

sections.title: Установка на главный экран
sections.content: Откройте serpmonn.ru в браузере на телефоне. Дальше — по системе.
steps: Android (Chrome): меню браузера (⋮) → «Установить приложение» / «Добавить на главный экран» → подтвердите. Либо в меню сайта Serpmonn: Приложения → «Установить на главный экран».
iPhone / iPad (Safari): кнопка «Поделиться» → «На экран „Домой“» → «Добавить».
После установки откройте значок Serpmonn с рабочего стола — сайт запустится без лишней панели браузера.
sections.note: Если пункта установки нет, обновите браузер или попробуйте Chrome / Safari. На некоторых устройствах установка появляется только после повторного захода на сайт.

sections.title: Скачать для Android (.apk)
sections.content: Файл лежит в разделе меню «Приложения» → «Мобильные приложения» → «Serpmonn для Android (.apk)».
steps: Скачайте файл на телефон.
Откройте загрузку. Если Android спросит разрешение на установку из этого источника — разрешите для файлового менеджера или браузера.
Установите приложение и откройте его с рабочего стола.
sections.note: APK не из Google Play: система может показать предупреждение — это ожидаемо для прямой загрузки. Скачивайте только с сайта serpmonn.ru.

sections.title: Про Messenger
sections.content: Пункт «Serpmonn Messenger» открывает страницу приложения. Сейчас мессенджер работает только как нативное приложение для Android — скачайте APK со страницы и установите на телефон. В браузере переписываться пока нельзя; веб-клиент ещё не сделан. Это не то же самое, что «Serpmonn для Android» (ярлык сайта): у мессенджера свой установочный файл.

faqItems.question: Чем «главный экран» отличается от APK?
faqItems.answer: На главный экран — это ярлык сайта, который ставится через браузер. APK — установочный пакет Android. Оба ведут к Serpmonn; APK чаще выбирают, если установка через браузер недоступна.

faqItems.question: Нужны ли Google Play или App Store?
faqItems.answer: Нет. Достаточно браузера или APK с сайта.

faqItems.question: Это безопасно?
faqItems.answer: Ставьте только с официального адреса serpmonn.ru. Не устанавливайте «Serpmonn» с сторонних сайтов и рассылок.

faqItems.question: Можно ли поставить и ярлык, и APK?
faqItems.answer: Да, но обычно хватает одного способа, чтобы не путаться в двух значках.

content.conclusion: Сначала попробуйте «Установить на главный экран». Если не получается — скачайте «Serpmonn для Android». Мессенджер — отдельно: только Android APK со своей страницы, без веб-версии.

twitter.title: How to install Serpmonn
twitter.description: Home Screen or Android APK — a short guide.

article.title: How to install Serpmonn: Home Screen and Android APK

summary.title: In short:
summary.text: two options. “Add to Home Screen” uses the browser — no app store. The APK is an Android install file when you want a separate system app icon.

sections.title: Which to choose
items: Add to Home Screen — the site opens like an app: its own icon and a fuller screen. Best for most people. No store download.
Serpmonn for Android (.apk) — an install file. Useful if the browser doesn’t offer install, or you want a classic Android app icon.
Serpmonn Messenger — a separate Android app (pre-alpha). There is no web chat yet: the menu item opens a page where you download the Messenger APK.

sections.title: Add to Home Screen
sections.content: Open serpmonn.ru in your phone browser, then follow your OS.
steps: Android (Chrome): browser menu (⋮) → “Install app” / “Add to Home screen” → confirm. Or in the Serpmonn menu: Apps → “Add to Home Screen”.
iPhone / iPad (Safari): Share → “Add to Home Screen” → Add.
Then open the Serpmonn icon from your Home Screen — it launches without the full browser chrome.
sections.note: If you don’t see Install, update the browser or try Chrome / Safari. On some devices the option appears after visiting the site again.

sections.title: Download for Android (.apk)
sections.content: Find it under Apps → Mobile apps → “Serpmonn for Android (.apk)”.
steps: Download the file to your phone.
Open the download. If Android asks to allow installs from that source, allow it for the Files app or browser.
Install and open Serpmonn from the Home Screen.
sections.note: This APK is not from Google Play, so Android may show a warning — expected for sideloading. Only download from serpmonn.ru.

sections.title: About Messenger
sections.content: “Serpmonn Messenger” opens the app page. Messenger currently works only as a native Android app — download the APK from that page and install it on your phone. You cannot chat in the browser yet; a web client is not available. This is not the same as “Serpmonn for Android” (site shortcut): Messenger has its own install file.

faqItems.question: Home Screen vs APK?
faqItems.answer: Home Screen is a browser-installed shortcut to the site. APK is an Android package. Both open Serpmonn; pick APK if browser install isn’t available.

faqItems.question: Do I need Google Play or the App Store?
faqItems.answer: No. The browser or the site APK is enough.

faqItems.question: Is it safe?
faqItems.answer: Install only from serpmonn.ru. Don’t install “Serpmonn” from random sites or messages.

faqItems.question: Can I install both?
faqItems.answer: Yes, but one method is usually enough so you don’t end up with two icons.

content.conclusion: Try “Add to Home Screen” first. If that fails, download “Serpmonn for Android”. Messenger is separate: Android APK only from its page — no web version yet.

article.title: How to install Serpmonn: Home Screen and Android APK

summary.title: In short:
summary.text: two options. “Add to Home Screen” uses the browser — no app store. The APK is an Android install file when you want a separate system app icon.

sections.title: Which to choose
items: Add to Home Screen — the site opens like an app: its own icon and a fuller screen. Best for most people. No store download.
Serpmonn for Android (.apk) — an install file. Useful if the browser doesn’t offer install, or you want a classic Android app icon.
Serpmonn Messenger — a separate Android app (pre-alpha). There is no web chat yet: the menu item opens a page where you download the Messenger APK.

sections.title: Add to Home Screen
sections.content: Open serpmonn.ru in your phone browser, then follow your OS.
steps: Android (Chrome): browser menu (⋮) → “Install app” / “Add to Home screen” → confirm. Or in the Serpmonn menu: Apps → “Add to Home Screen”.
iPhone / iPad (Safari): Share → “Add to Home Screen” → Add.
Then open the Serpmonn icon from your Home Screen — it launches without the full browser chrome.
sections.note: If you don’t see Install, update the browser or try Chrome / Safari. On some devices the option appears after visiting the site again.

sections.title: Download for Android (.apk)
sections.content: Find it under Apps → Mobile apps → “Serpmonn for Android (.apk)”.
steps: Download the file to your phone.
Open the download. If Android asks to allow installs from that source, allow it for the Files app or browser.
Install and open Serpmonn from the Home Screen.
sections.note: This APK is not from Google Play, so Android may show a warning — expected for sideloading. Only download from serpmonn.ru.

sections.title: About Messenger
sections.content: “Serpmonn Messenger” opens the app page. Messenger currently works only as a native Android app — download the APK from that page and install it on your phone. You cannot chat in the browser yet; a web client is not available. This is not the same as “Serpmonn for Android” (site shortcut): Messenger has its own install file.

faqItems.question: Do I need Google Play or the App Store?

steps: Android (Chrome): browser menu (⋮) → “Install app” / “Add to Home screen” → confirm. Or in the Serpmonn menu: Apps → “Add to Home Screen”.
iPhone / iPad (Safari): Share → “Add to Home Screen” → Add.
Then open the Serpmonn icon from your Home Screen — it launches without the full browser chrome.
sections.note: If you don’t see Install, update the browser or try Chrome / Safari. On some devices the option appears after visiting the site again.

sections.title: Download for Android (.apk)
sections.content: Find it under Apps → Mobile apps → “Serpmonn for Android (.apk)”.
steps: Download the file to your phone.
Open the download. If Android asks to allow installs from that source, allow it for the Files app or browser.
Install and open Serpmonn from the Home Screen.
sections.note: This APK is not from Google Play, so Android may show a warning — expected for sideloading. Only download from serpmonn.ru.

sections.title: About Messenger
sections.content: “Serpmonn Messenger” opens the app page. Messenger currently works only as a native Android app — download the APK from that page and install it on your phone. You cannot chat in the browser yet; a web client is not available. This is not the same as “Serpmonn for Android” (site shortcut): Messenger has its own install file.

faqItems.question: Home Screen vs APK?
faqItems.answer: Home Screen is a browser-installed shortcut to the site. APK is an Android package. Both open Serpmonn; pick APK if browser install isn’t available.

faqItems.question: Do I need Google Play or the App Store?
faqItems.answer: No. The browser or the site APK is enough.

faqItems.question: Is it safe?
faqItems.answer: Install only from serpmonn.ru. Don’t install “Serpmonn” from random sites or messages.

faqItems.question: Can I install both?
faqItems.answer: Yes, but one method is usually enough so you don’t end up with two icons.

content.conclusion: Try “Add to Home Screen” first. If that fails, download “Serpmonn for Android”. Messenger is separate: Android APK only from its page — no web version yet.

article.title: How to install Serpmonn: Home Screen and Android APK

summary.title: In short:
summary.text: two options. “Add to Home Screen” uses the browser — no app store. The APK is an Android install file when you want a separate system app icon.

sections.title: Which to choose
items: Add to Home Screen — the site opens like an app: its own icon and a fuller screen. Best for most people. No store download.
Serpmonn for Android (.apk) — an install file. Useful if the browser doesn’t offer install, or you want a classic Android app icon.
Serpmonn Messenger — a separate Android app (pre-alpha). There is no web chat yet: the menu item opens a page where you download the Messenger APK.

sections.title: Add to Home Screen
sections.content: Open serpmonn.ru in your phone browser, then follow your OS.
steps: Android (Chrome): browser menu (⋮) → “Install app” / “Add to Home screen” → confirm. Or in the Serpmonn menu: Apps → “Add to Home Screen”.
iPhone / iPad (Safari): Share → “Add to Home Screen” → Add.
Then open the Serpmonn icon from your Home Screen — it launches without the full browser chrome.
sections.note: If you don’t see Install, update the browser or try Chrome / Safari. On some devices the option appears after visiting the site again.

sections.title: Download for Android (.apk)
sections.content: Find it under Apps → Mobile apps → “Serpmonn for Android (.apk)”.
steps: Download the file to your phone.
Open the download. If Android asks to allow installs from that source, allow it for the Files app or browser.
Install and open Serpmonn from the Home Screen.
sections.note: This APK is not from Google Play, so Android may show a warning — expected for sideloading. Only download from serpmonn.ru.

sections.title: About Messenger
sections.content: “Serpmonn Messenger” opens the app page. Messenger currently works only as a native Android app — download the APK from that page and install it on your phone. You cannot chat in the browser yet; a web client is not available. This is not the same as “Serpmonn for Android” (site shortcut): Messenger has its own install file.

faqItems.question: Home Screen vs APK?
faqItems.answer: Home Screen is a browser-installed shortcut to the site. APK is an Android package. Both open Serpmonn; pick APK if browser install isn’t available.

faqItems.question: Do I need Google Play or the App Store?
faqItems.answer: No. The browser or the site APK is enough.

faqItems.question: Is it safe?
faqItems.answer: Install only from serpmonn.ru. Don’t install “Serpmonn” from random sites or messages.

faqItems.question: Can I install both?
faqItems.answer: Yes, but one method is usually enough so you don’t end up with two icons.

content.conclusion: Try “Add to Home Screen” first. If that fails, download “Serpmonn for Android”. Messenger is separate: Android APK only from its page — no web version yet.

meta.title: How to install Serpmonn: Home Screen and Android
meta.description: Add Serpmonn to your phone’s Home Screen or download the Android APK. What’s the difference and when to choose which.
meta.keywords: install Serpmonn, Home Screen, Android APK, web app, installation

summary.title: In short:

sections.title: Which to choose
items: Add to Home Screen — the site opens like an app: its own icon and a fuller screen. Best for most people. No store download.
Serpmonn for Android (.apk) — an install file. Useful if the browser doesn’t offer install, or you want a classic Android app icon.
Serpmonn Messenger — a separate Android app (pre-alpha). There is no web chat yet: the menu item opens a page where you download the Messenger APK.

sections.title: Add to Home Screen
sections.content: Open serpmonn.ru in your phone browser, then follow your OS.
steps: Android (Chrome): browser menu (⋮) → “Install app” / “Add to Home screen” → confirm. Or in the Serpmonn menu: Apps → “Add to Home Screen”.
iPhone / iPad (Safari): Share → “Add to Home Screen” → Add.
Then open the Serpmonn icon from your Home Screen — it launches without the full browser chrome.
sections.note: If you don’t see Install, update the browser or try Chrome / Safari. On some devices the option appears after visiting the site again.

sections.title: Download for Android (.apk)
sections.content: Find it under Apps → Mobile apps → “Serpmonn for Android (.apk)”.
steps: Download the file to your phone.
Open the download. If Android asks to allow installs from that source, allow it for the Files app or browser.

sections.note: This APK is not from Google Play, so Android may show a warning — expected for sideloading. Only download from serpmonn.ru.

sections.title: About Messenger
sections.content: “Serpmonn Messenger” opens the app page. Messenger currently works only as a native Android app — download the APK from that page and install it on your phone. You cannot chat in the browser yet; a web client is not available. This is not the same as “Serpmonn for Android” (site shortcut): Messenger has its own install file.
